name: Dark Spell Regeneration
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>暗</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>黒</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>再</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>生</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target 1 Spell in your opponent's GY; Set it to your field. You can banish this card from your GY and send 1 "Monster Reborn" from your hand or Set on your field to the GY; Special Summon 1 "The Winged Dragon of Ra" from your GY ignoring its Summoning conditions, then you can send 1 monster your opponent controls to the GY, also send that Special Summoned monster to the GY during the End Phase.
eff: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: Target 1 Spell in your opponent's GY; Set it to your field. You can banish this card from your GY and send 1 "Monster Reborn" from your hand or Set on your field to the GY; Special Summon 1 "The Winged Dragon of Ra" from your GY ignoring its Summoning conditions, then you can send 1 monster your opponent controls to the GY, also send that Special Summoned monster to the GY during the End Phase.

action: Sets from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
